Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet

Class RestResource.DefaultBuilder<R extends RestResource>

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.AbstractRestBuilder<R,SELF>
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.RestResource.Builder<R,RestResource.DefaultBuilder<R>>
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.RestResource.DefaultBuilder<R>
Type Parameters:
R - The resource type produced by RestResource.Builder.build().
All Implemented Interfaces:
RestBuilder<RestResource.DefaultBuilder<R>>
Enclosing class:
RestResource
public static final class RestResource.DefaultBuilder<R extends RestResource> extends RestResource.Builder<R,RestResource.DefaultBuilder<R>>
Concrete default leaf builder returned by RestResource.builder(Class) for the common (non-subclassed) case.
